data.title: SY Holdings Group Limited Announces Final Dividend with Currency Option
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from SY Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:6069) ).

SY Holdings Group Limited has announced a final cash dividend for the year ending December 31, 2024, with an option for shareholders to receive the dividend in either RMB or HKD. The dividend amount is set at RMB 0.347 per share, with an exchange rate for the alternative currency option of RMB 1 to HKD 1.0885. This update reflects a change in the exchange rate for the alternative currency option, and the payment date is scheduled for June 20, 2025.

More about SY Holdings Group Limited

New World Resources Limited ( (AU:NWC) ) has issued an update.

New World Resources Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, with Director Nick Woolrych acquiring an additional 500,000 shares through a share placement. This change, approved by shareholders, reflects an increase in Woolrych’s indirect holdings, potentially signaling confidence in the company’s future prospects and stability. The acquisition was made at $0.02 per share, indicating a strategic move to strengthen the director’s stake in the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NWC) stock is a Buy with a A$0.12 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on New World Resources Limited stock, see the AU:NWC Stock Forecast page.

New World Resources Limited operates in the resources sector, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is engaged in identifying and advancing mineral projects with a market focus on expanding its resource base and enhancing shareholder value.

Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) just unveiled an update.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited, listed on the ASX under the ticker SEC, has announced its estimated pre-tax Net Tangible Asset (NTA) backing per share as of June 12, 2025, to be $2.461. This figure is unaudited and reflects the company’s investment portfolio and cash balances, adjusted for management and performance fees, as well as estimated operating costs and income taxes. This announcement provides stakeholders with an insight into the company’s financial health and asset management efficiency, although it remains an approximate figure.

The latest announcement is out from Beijing Sports and Entertainment Industry Group ( (HK:1803) ).

Beijing Sports and Entertainment Industry Group Limited announced that all proposed resolutions at their Annual General Meeting held on June 13, 2025, were unanimously approved by shareholders. These resolutions included the adoption of financial statements, re-election of directors, authorization of directors’ remuneration, reappointment of auditors, and granting of mandates for share repurchase and issuance. The unanimous approval reflects strong shareholder support and positions the company for strategic flexibility in its operations.

data.title: Nanologica’s Takeover Offer Deemed Financially Unreasonable
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Nanologica AB ( (SE:NICA) ) has shared an update.

Nanologica AB’s independent bid committee has received a Fairness Opinion from Redeye AB regarding a public takeover offer from Flerie AB. The opinion concludes that the offer, valued at approximately 88.8 million kronor, is not financially reasonable for Nanologica’s shareholders. This assessment may impact the company’s strategic decisions and influence shareholder perspectives on the takeover bid.

More about Nanologica AB

Nanologica AB operates in the biotechnology industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of nanoporous silica for drug delivery and chromatography applications. The company aims to enhance drug formulation and improve the efficiency of pharmaceutical processes.

CRH plc ( (CRH) ) has issued an update.

CRH plc, a leading player in the building materials industry, has announced the acquisition and cancellation of its own ordinary shares in the United States as part of a $300 million buyback program. This strategic move, executed through BNP Paribas Securities Corp, aims to optimize the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of shares in circulation, thereby increasing earnings per share.

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Solstice Minerals Limited ( (AU:SLS) ).

Solstice Minerals Limited has announced a change in the substantial holding of its shares by Treasury Services Group Pty Ltd, acting on behalf of the Nero Resource Fund. The fund’s voting power in Solstice Minerals has decreased from 8.51% to 6.39%, indicating a reduction in their stake. This change in shareholding could impact the company’s market dynamics and influence its strategic decisions, affecting stakeholders’ interests.

data.title: Greatview Aseptic Packaging Faces Further Delays in Annual Results Publication
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) is now available.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited has announced a further delay in the publication of its 2024 Annual Results, the postponement of its Board meeting, and the delay in dispatching the 2024 Annual Report due to an incomplete investigation by Grant Thornton Advisory. The company is working closely with its auditors to resolve outstanding issues and aims to publish the results by July 31, 2025. Trading in the company’s shares remains suspended since February 19, 2025, until further notice, impacting stakeholders and market confidence.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited operates in the packaging industry, specializing in aseptic packaging solutions. The company focuses on providing packaging services and products that cater to the food and beverage industry, ensuring product safety and extending shelf life.

data.title: Borregaard ASA Announces Leadership Changes in BioSolutions Division
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Borregaard ASA ( (GB:0QB7) ) has provided an update.

Borregaard ASA has announced the appointment of Knut-Harald Bakke as the new Executive Vice President of BioSolutions, effective August 1, 2025. Bakke, who currently serves as Director of Investor Relations, will also join the Group Executive Management. This leadership change is part of a broader transition as Tom Erik Foss-Jacobsen steps into the CEO role. The company will begin searching for a new Director of Investor Relations, with CFO Per Bjarne Lyngstad temporarily assuming the role. These changes are expected to impact Borregaard’s strategic direction and operational focus in the bio-based solutions sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0QB7) stock is a Buy with a NOK210.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Borregaard ASA stock, see the GB:0QB7 Stock Forecast page.

More about Borregaard ASA

Borregaard ASA operates in the bio-based solutions industry, focusing on the development and production of sustainable biochemicals and biomaterials. The company is known for its innovative approach to utilizing natural raw materials to create products that serve various markets, including agriculture, construction, and pharmaceuticals.
